_comment: Contract from jazz-idea-generator to abc-notation-writer. Fill every field. Chord beats per section must sum to the meter's beats-per-bar. The 'arc' is the master: every section's phrasing and tension must serve it. Remove this _comment in the final file.
title: Untitled
feel: relaxed swung-16th, slightly behind the beat

phases.requires: low-mid register, melody stops on unresolved tones, sparse, laid-back
rhythm tightens, bass steps up, register climbs, instrument enters
high register, full ensemble, melody holds its peak note, open harmony
register falls, rhythm loosens, resolve to tonic, space

hook.description: one-sentence description of the memorable motif and what makes it stick
hook.rhythm: where it lands, e.g. syncopated pickup into a held target note
hook.contour: interval shape, e.g. rise an octave then fall to the b5

sections.label: A1

phrasing.note_lengths: short phrases with long gaps between them
phrasing.contour: gentle rise then fall, stopping on the 6th (unresolved)
phrasing.peak_note: not here — saved for the peak section
phrasing.motif: state the hook motif, fragment form

sections.tension: melody left hanging on an unresolved tone; sparse texture — no build yet
sections.bass_character: sparse, syncopated, lands on beat 1 then leaves space

ending: resolve to Cm9 with a ritard and widening space, or a clean loop point
